prompt: I'm building a SaaS dashboard for project management in React. The target audience is remote teams in tech companies. We want something modern and professional. Generate a complete design system for this.

assertions.name: includes_color_palette
assertions.description: Response includes a complete color palette with primary, secondary, accent, and semantic colors with hex codes

assertions.name: includes_typography
assertions.description: Response specifies typography system with font names, weights, and sizes for headings, body, and captions

assertions.name: domain_specific_guidance
assertions.description: Response includes PM-specific component guidance (task lists, dashboards, status indicators, etc.)

assertions.name: includes_anti_patterns
assertions.description: Response includes do's and don'ts or anti-patterns specific to project management tools

assertions.name: framework_aware
assertions.description: Response mentions React-specific implementation guidance or component patterns

assertions.name: structured_output
assertions.description: Response is organized with clear sections (overview, colors, typography, components, etc.)
